target_market_label.zh: 欧盟（CE / 玩具安全指令）
target_market_label.zht: 歐盟（CE / 玩具安全指令）

title.zh: 中国玩具进入欧盟：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國玩具進入歐盟：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China toy certification (CCC / GB 6675 series) against EU CE marking requirements under the Toy Safety Directive 2009/48/EC, EN 71 series, EN IEC 62115, and REACH.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国玩具认证（CCC / GB 6675系列）与欧盟玩具安全指令2009/48/EC、EN 71系列、EN IEC 62115及REACH项下CE标志要求的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國玩具認證（CCC / GB 6675系列）與歐盟玩具安全指令2009/48/EC、EN 71系列、EN IEC 62115及REACH項下CE標誌要求的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Toy manufacturers, exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current EU law, harmonised standards, chemical restriction lists, and destination-country requirements with qualified professionals before placing products on the EU market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。玩具制造商、出口商、进口商及经销商在将产品投放欧盟市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行欧盟法律、协调标准、化学物质限制清单及目标国要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。玩具製造商、出口商、進口商及經銷商在將產品投放歐盟市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行歐盟法律、協調標準、化學物質限制清單及目標國要求。

answer_first.en: EN 71-3 chemical migration (expanded to 19 elements in 2019), REACH substance restrictions, EU Authorised Representative appointment, and multi-language labelling are the major EU gaps compared with Chinese GB 6675 / CCC toy compliance.
answer_first.zh: 相较中国GB 6675 / CCC玩具合规，EN 71-3化学迁移（2019年扩展至19种元素）、REACH物质限制、委任欧盟授权代表及多语言标签，是进入欧盟的主要差距。
answer_first.zht: 相較中國GB 6675 / CCC玩具合規，EN 71-3化學遷移（2019年擴展至19種元素）、REACH物質限制、委任歐盟授權代表及多語言標籤，是進入歐盟的主要差距。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
